title: Shri Mahavirji
tagline: Shri Mahavirji — spiritual town of Rajasthan

overview.short: The Shri Mahaveer Ji Temple is major Jain pilgrimage site situated in the Shri Mahaveerji town in Hindaun Block, Karauli district in Rajasthan.
overview.description: The Shri Mahaveer Ji Temple is major Jain pilgrimage site situated in the Shri Mahaveerji town in Hindaun Block, Karauli district in Rajasthan.

topPlaces.name: Shri Mahaveer Ji (town)
topPlaces.description: Shri Mahaveer Ji is a town and tehsil headquarter in Hindaun Block, Karauli District, Rajasthan. Approximately 20,000 people live there, and Many villages come within its area.

topPlaces.name: Baragama
topPlaces.description: Baragama is a village in mahaveer Tehsil, Karauli district, Rajasthan, India, and forms a part of Bharatpur Division. It is located 34 km (21 mi) north of the district headquarters at Karauli, 7 km (4.3 mi) from Hindaun and 131 km (81 mi) from the state capital at Jaipur.

topPlaces.name: Jaggar Dam
topPlaces.description: Jaggar Dam is an Earthen dam near Jagar Village of Hindaun City in Hindaun Block, Rajasthan, India. The dam was completed in 1957 for the purpose of irrigation and water supply.

topPlaces.name: Khandip Dam
topPlaces.description: Khandip Dam (also known as Khandip Aniket, in Hindi खंडीप बांध) is a weir which is built on the Ganbhir River at Khandip Village of Rajasthan, India. It lies in a valley to the south of the Khandip and north of the Katkad, east of Nawajipura and West of Medi and Phulwara.

topPlaces.name: Hindaun Block
topPlaces.description: Hindaun is a block in Karauli district of the Indian state of Rajasthan in Northern India. It is a subdivisional headquarter.

topPlaces.name: Mahu Ibrahimpur
topPlaces.description: Mahu Ibrahimpur is a town in Hindaun Block in Karauli district of the Indian state of Rajasthan in Northern India. The town is located in the vicinity of the Aravalli Range.

topPlaces.name: Danalpur
topPlaces.description: Danalpur is a village in Shri Mahaveer Ji Block of Rajasthan, India. It is located near Shri Mahavirji, which is a famous Jain religious place and is well connected to Jaipur ( the capital of Rajasthan) through State Highway.

items.note: Shri Mahaveer Ji is a town and tehsil headquarter in Hindaun Block, Karauli District, Rajasthan. Approximately 20,000 people live there, and Many villages come within its area.

Baragama is a village in mahaveer Tehsil, Karauli district, Rajasthan, India, and forms a part of Bharatpur Division. It is located 34 km (21 mi) north of the district headquarters at Karauli, 7 km (4.3 mi) from Hindaun and 131 km (81 mi) from the state capital at Jaipur.
Jaggar Dam is an Earthen dam near Jagar Village of Hindaun City in Hindaun Block, Rajasthan, India. The dam was completed in 1957 for the purpose of irrigation and water supply.

Khandip Dam (also known as Khandip Aniket, in Hindi खंडीप बांध) is a weir which is built on the Ganbhir River at Khandip Village of Rajasthan, India. It lies in a valley to the south of the Khandip and north of the Katkad, east of Nawajipura and West of Medi and Phulwara.
Hindaun is a block in Karauli district of the Indian state of Rajasthan in Northern India. It is a subdivisional headquarter.
Mahu Ibrahimpur is a town in Hindaun Block in Karauli district of the Indian state of Rajasthan in Northern India. The town is located in the vicinity of the Aravalli Range.

Danalpur is a village in Shri Mahaveer Ji Block of Rajasthan, India. It is located near Shri Mahavirji, which is a famous Jain religious place and is well connected to Jaipur ( the capital of Rajasthan) through State Highway.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shri Mahavirji?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shri Mahavirji is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shri Mahavirji?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jaipur International Airport (112 km) and the nearest railway station is Jaipur Junction (116 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shri Mahavirji?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shri Mahavirji at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shri Mahavirji?
faq.a: Stays in Shri Mahavirji start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shri Mahavirji?
faq.a: The top attractions are Shri Mahaveer Ji (town), Baragama, Jaggar Dam, Khandip Dam, Hindaun Block.
